designer.description: I am Héctor "Titus" Ruiz, a Peruvian designer based in the Canary Islands. I'm focused on Brand Identity Design and UI Design. I help companies build brands, discovering their true potential through a research-based design process, creating an impactful identity.

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>

<head>
	<title></title>
	<meta charset="UTF-8">
	<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width">
	<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css?family=Cabin" rel="stylesheet" type="text/css">
	<style>
		.bee-row,

			position: relative

		.bee-form .bee-form-row .bee-field button {

		.bee-row-19 .bee-col-4 .bee-block-2,

		}

		.bee-button a,
		.bee-menu ul li a {

		}

		.bee-divider,
		.bee-image {
			overflow: auto
		}

		.bee-divider .center,

			margin: 0 auto
		}

		.bee-row-10 .bee-col-1 .bee-block-1,

			width: 100%

		.bee-form .bee-form-row .bee-field {
			padding: 3px;
			display: flex;
			flex: 1;
			flex-wrap: wrap;

			display: block

		.bee-form .bee-form-row .bee-field .bee-form-option-wrapper {

			margin-left: 15px
		}

		.bee-form .bee-form-row .bee-field .bee-button-container {

		.bee-form input[type=color] {
